reviews.review_description: This app is glitchy to the point where im just going to take my loss and delete it. I should have done the monthly subscription instead of the lifetime membership. The trial was great but after that I'm not impressed. I was in the middle of day 2 of mindfulness. Then it tells me to use the controller trigger button. I use it and the app freezes. Then I had to restart the app and it does it all over again. You can't skip through to where you left off. It's more annoying than anything. Oh and for some reason every time i load it the 1st time it crashes. The second time it loads perfectly.

developer_response.body:
Hi Mettatron, really sorry for the bug you mentioned, we'll look into it ASAP. Could you also please email me at tim@mindway.studio and I'll  do my best to make sure you're taken care of?

I don't want anyone to get stuck paying for an app they're not using. 

Best,
Tim, CEO @ Mindway

reviews.review_description: I have been using the Mindway VR app and have found it genuinely beneficial, especially the guided breathing exercises. The live session with Su was excellent—her calming presence and introduction of practical techniques made the experience even more meaningful. I am already noticing the value of deep breathing and the STOP method in helping me pause, reset, and manage stress more intentionally. I appreciate that Mindway VR offers tools that feel both accessible and effective, and I look forward to the next session and continuing to build these practices into my routine.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review! Please if you ever have any questions don't hesitate to email me at tim@mindway.studio

Best,
Tim, CEO

reviews.review_title: Do Not Waste Your Money on this
reviews.review_description:
For a striking uber expensive subscription fee, i was expecting more. MUCH MORE 
Mindway will show you a very old fashioned pixilated, unrealistic lanscape that is never… or ..hardly moves, 
In the meanwhile they would give you a narrative which 75% repetition. If you wish… to listen more than one session
The app will tell you to think this…or …that 
but you wont have headspace due to the constant narrative occupying your mind.
My deal was free 7 days trial and £0.99 promo for a month after that £6.99 but @horizon billed me for full, not a good look

developer_response.body:
I'm really sorry to hear this Anxena! I don't have any control over Horizon's payment system but I've heard that sometimes it can get confused.. Please email me at tim@mindway.studio and I will make this right..

Tim, CEO @ Mindway

reviews.review_description: This app has helped me to manage my anxiety really well.The 30 days of mindfulness programme really helped me.and I look forward to the weekly live group with meditation by Su. Its kept me grounded and relaxed.

developer_response.body:
Really glad to hear this, thank you for sharing your wonderful review Lily!

Best, 
Tim, CEO

reviews.review_description: As an experienced meditator, I find Mindway to be a great refresher for many of the foundational meditative practices. Some of the scenes are interesting and relaxing; others can be a bit too vibrant or unrealistic. There is something for everyone. I really enjoy the live meditations with Su. She usually does them twice a week. She is skilled at leading the sessions and it is great to be able to meditate with other likeminded people throughout the globe.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your lovely review!

reviews.review_title: Very happy! I meditate every day.
reviews.review_description:
This app has many tools to help you have a better day for the rest of your life. How can you put a price on that?
In addition to this is guided meditations by a licensed psychologist. You can also make a custom meditation to better fit your needs. There is a lot going on if you look around. Get the lifetime and save. I have found customer support to be outstanding. The guided meditations by Su are well worth it whatever the price of the subscription. I would highly recommend buying the Mindway app.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your great review!

reviews.review_title: the best meditation app I've ever had
reviews.review_description:
I've had headspace, calm, meditopia, tripp, liminal, but this tops all of them! meditating is so easy and immersive with this app! The one thing I would love to see is a folder or some kind of way to select meditations and save them as favorites for later! that would make it over the top!

edit: I wrote this months ago, but it looks like it I didn't submit it. also, I'm seeing all of these negative reviews and all of this technical stuff all of these issues and I haven't had any issues. and now there's snow in the fireside and in the menu and I think it's really beautiful. I would like to see more experiences however. but the graphics are great and the nature is great.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your lovely review! Folders is a good idea :) And new content coming soon - we just completed a major technical "backend" update which will allow us to produce new content more quickly.

reviews.review_description:
I have tried a few, but this is by far the best.  I love the worlds they have created and the guidance provided.  It’s really well done.  

At one point I had an issue with a glitch in the app.  I wrote the developer and he responded the same day, connecting me to tech support.  Within a couple of days the issue was resolved and I received a message back asking me to make sure everything was working well.  It was!  

Amazing customer service and an app that provides beautiful meditation guidance.  I highly recommend this app and company.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your lovely review Joanne!

reviews.review_description: this app is really amazing and helpful. i have always had a trouble with meditation since my overly active brain can’t sit still and i cant get it calm down and i dont find it easy to visualise stuff with guided meditation but the visuals in this app really help stay focused..i feel those meditations are more helpful than the traditional stuff i tried before..also i love the sessions with sue..looking forward for more mindway

developer_response.body:
I'm so glad you found Mindway useful! This is exactly the kind of problem we set out to solve when first building the app.

Please don't hesitate to contact me if you need anything at all at tim@mindway.studio

- Tim, CEO @ Mindway Studio

reviews.review_description:
I love this app.  It’s so calming and teaches me to just stop, breathe and be without fixing a thing.  I’m starting to bring those teachings into my daily life.  I ran into an 
issue where the app crashed but that was quickly fixed.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your lovely review!

Tim, CEO

reviews.review_description:
This app is fantastic for relieving stress, boosting my emotional well-being, building confidence, and improving my sleep quality. I typically use it at night before bed, and it really helps me unwind. Whenever I feel stressed, I turn to this app.

However, I have to give it just three stars. Today was particularly tough, and I was really looking forward to pouring myself a glass of wine and practicing mindfulness through meditation. Unfortunately, the app wasn't working. It kept prompting me to update to the latest version, but even after updating, I still received the same message. Unable to use the app after trying for an hour, I ended up downloading a different meditation app for much less, and it provided the relief I needed.

developer_response.body:
Update to My Response: We have fixed this issue - you should be able to use the app without issue now; sorry for the inconvenience!

Original Response: I'm really sorry to hear that :( We've heard a few people have had this problem but are unable to recreate it internally - we're trying to figure out what is causing the issue so that we can fix it. I suspect it may be to do with one of the third party services we use, or to do with Meta's systems. Could you email me at tim@mindway.studio and I'll make sure you get taken care of?

Best,
Tim, CEO @ Mindway

reviews.review_description:
* Updating my review in response to the reviews I see comparing this app to Tripp. I have both apps. While Tripp has more trippy graphics  that are truly stunning and more options,  Mindway is still beautiful and the guided meditations and breathwork are much much better in Mindway. If you’re looking at mindful/meditation apps for your mental health and want quality guided meditations Mindway is the better choice. 

I got this app about a year ago and it’s still the best meditation app out there and I think I have most of them. If you have anxiety,experienced trauma, need help dealing with stress, starting your day the best way possible or unwinding at the end of the day, this is the right app for you. This app is perfect even if you’re dealing with something serious like P.T.S.D. 

Mindway is exceptional in every way , from its beauty, the music, the guided meditations, breath work and even live group sessions . You can set up your own private sessions and meditate with a friend as well. I love it so much that after a year of paying monthly I bought lifetime access.

I iike the app a lot. BUT having been through almost all the sessions I am disappointed that there are no new ones. Please consider adding new stuff.
Greg Saiter

developer_response.body:
Hi Greg & thanks for your feedback! We just added a new meditation on Stoic Resilience today, and two more meditations in that series are on their way. Would love for you to check it out.

Best,
Tim, CEO

reviews.review_description:
Well, I haven’t used this app since the previous review and came back today to discover that I can no longer access any of what I could before. Now it’s subscription only and I can only access a demo. I’m downgrading 5 stars to 1 for the bait and switch. As soon as they got enough 5 star reviews they denied access to those who gave them which is a really shady business practice. 

Previous review

Now that it’s working correctly and I have access to the full app, I’ll update my review. I may update it again later after I explore it further. Basically, if you like Tripp, Guided Meditation, Liminal and similar, you will like this. I haven’t tried all the experiences yet, some have better graphics than others and in the build your own, you can still only choose a male voice and 13 minutes length but I’m assuming that will be updated. There are some creative experiences on here I haven’t seen elsewhere including a section for ASMR. 

I’m so happy there are apps like this in the store as a break from the plethora of violent shooting games so I’m giving it 5 stars but this, just like the other meditation apps I mentioned earlier, have the same problem. They assume everyone is anxiety riddled stressed messes who only think negative thoughts rather than someone like me who prefers the upbeat professional quality meditations by people like Kelly Howell, Hemi-Sync, Richard Sutphen, (his name is actually the shortened version of Richard starting with a D but the app is calling it profanity lol) Glenn Harrold, Brad Austin, Abraham-Hicks and others (some available on Apple Music and probably other streaming services, some and other good ones on Hay House’s app and all available for individual purchase (audio only.)

As a Certified Hypnotherapist, I find most of the verbal part of the meditations on this app and others for VR are not actual meditations but generic bad unprofessional attempts at some sort of verbal therapy for people with specific problems and issues. When I’m in a good mood and relaxed and just want to hear something positive and uplifting while looking at pretty visuals, it’s jarring to hear the words “stress, anxiety, negativity” etc… when I don’t feel those things and now I’m searching for things to be stressed and negative about. Negative words should NEVER be spoken in a meditation or hypnosis because your subconscious mind will take that as meaning that’s how you should feel and takes you out of relaxation. Every word should be POSITIVE. Instead of saying things like “release all stress and anxiety” it should say “feel warm luxurious relaxation flow through you as you sink deeper into a soft fluffy cloud” or ‘imagine a beautiful white light flowing through every cell in your body, relaxing, healing, and rejuvenating you” or something like that. See the difference? 

That said, I’ve only tried a few of the experiences in this app, I will check out the rest and maybe update the review but I will probably eventually use the nicest visual experiences and turn the sound off and use with headphones with my own meditations. 

If the app developers would like me to write some decent meditations for them, please let me know. 😁

developer_response.body:
Hi Alicia; firstly, thank you for all the lovely things you said about Mindway in your previous review. I checked your account information and it looks like you previously owned a three month subscription to the app. You never renewed this subscription, so  lost access to the app after it expired. The app also offers a life-time purchase in which you own the app forever. If you would be so kind as to email me at tim@mindway.studio, I'd be happy to help you find a plan that works for you, and to chat to you about what kinds of meditations we might be able to work together on as you suggested. Thank you!

- Tim, CEO

reviews.review_description:
I have been using the app regularly for a couple of months and must say it has been very helpful and relaxing.   

This has been the first time I would say that I have been actually able to meditate.

This week I joined the live sessions with Su.  

These have had even more impact.

Thank you to the whole Monday VR team

reviews.review_title: Not what i thought it was
reviews.review_description: Had a play with the demo. I also looked at other mindfullness and meditation apps ... i ended up purchasing a full licence based off the demo .. i wish i had saved my money ... nothing like the demo .. niw i cant refund after owning it less than 24 hours .. piece of rubbish software

When then app launches it says that I’m using an older version and to update to a newer version. After clicking UPDATE MINDWAY nothing happens it just closes the app out. Tried entering from clearing app data, deleting and reinstalling app, and restarting headset. No luck. Was looking forward to using it but will cancel tomorrow if not resolved.

developer_response.body:
Update to My Response: We have fixed this issue - you should be able to use the app without issue now; sorry for the inconvenience!

Original Response: I'm really sorry to hear that :( We've heard a few people have had this problem but are unable to recreate it internally - we're trying to figure out what is causing the issue so that we can fix it. I suspect it may be to do with one of the third party services we use, or to do with Meta's systems. Could you email me at tim@mindway.studio and I'll make sure you get taken care of?

Best,
Tim, CEO @ Mindway

reviews.review_description: Title says it all. This feels like a cheaper copy version of Tripp. I was hoping this would be a little more original... but so much is just copied from Tripp. I was curious about the ASMR though, but didn't think it was relaxing at all, zero tingles. In fact, 'sleepy steps' is just straight up creepy nightmare fuel! Would not recommend this app at all. Sorry.
Medication with Sue today was very good

reviews.review_title: Su and everything else is AMAZING!!!
reviews.review_description: i have been using this app for about 6 months, and it has wholeheartedly changed my life in a positive way!! It was easy to make meditation a daily practice, and it slowly became one of the most important parts of my daily life. Highly recommend giving the app a try, and am excited for the positive effects it will have on you. When you want to go deeper the live guided meditation with Su are invigorating!!! 10/10!!!

I was really looking forward to trying this app but couldn't even get it to load. Kept saying that it couldn't connect to the server and to check my internet connection...even though the headset was connected to the WiFi and had an excellent connection. Did sign up for a yearly subscription but I'm just going to cancel it and delete the app.
Launched the app & was told to update. Clicked on update & then nothing. Uninstalled & reinstalled thinking that would do it… same problem. Will cancel trial tomorrow if not fixed

developer_response.body:
Update to My Response: We have fixed this issue - you should be able to use the app without issue now; sorry for the inconvenience!

Original Response: I'm really sorry to hear that :( We've heard a few people have had this problem but are unable to recreate it internally - we're trying to figure out what is causing the issue so that we can fix it. I suspect it may be to do with one of the third party services we use, or to do with Meta's systems. Could you email me at tim@mindway.studio and I'll make sure you get taken care of?

Best,
Tim, CEO @ Mindway

reviews.review_description: I spent much of my career in the Fraud Squad and so I am naturally sceptical. I downloaded Mindway with the same scepticism but was pleasantly surprised. The program has many aspects to it but the mindfulness aspect is the best for me. My ability to relax and to view life rationally was greatly enhanced and help to sleep methodology was very useful. The interactive sessions are by USA times but overall I would recommend this program to.any age group.
I find Mindway to be a really nice app. I am at an intermediate level of meditation and I think it's suitable for any level. It looks nice and has useful themes to meditate on.

I own over 90% of the meditation apps on Meta quest and hands down this is the best!!!!
thanks mindway
This is pure quality and I LOVE it! They have the most beautiful meditations. And a cozy atmosphere.
Mindways Mindfullness helpt my body and my mind to relax. It is a Powerful tool for me in my battle against PPPD.
This app is one of the best apps I’ve used for relaxation and I’ve used a few. I would highly recommend it

Trying to explore this app and am interested.  However, I cannot find how to connect to group sessions nor set up private sessions.  In addition the calendar doesn’t seem active.  No obvious support.  There is no active website as linked from the meta store?

developer_response.body:
Hi Knightmar - my apologies for this situation; the website is undergoing renovations and has been down for about a week; I'm not making excuses, just explaining what happened. If you go to mindway.studio - that website is active right now. 

To join the group sessions, you'll need to log onto the app at the predetermined times, which you can find by going to this link: https://shorturl.at/zHNno - and then hit "Join Public Session" in the main menu on the right.

Please also email me at tim@mindwayvr.com - just say "Hi, it's Knightmar" and I'd like to send you an update I think you'll like.

Sincerely,
Tim, CEO @ Mindway

reviews.review_description: I have been using this for a while now. I love some of the journey mindfulness scenes. There is a lot to explore. Something that I find outstanding are the fireside meditation sessions led by Su. These live personal sessions is not something I have found so easily accessible anywhere else.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review!

reviews.review_title: Came for the ASMR, staying for community
reviews.review_description: I originally came to experience the ASMR meditations which are really helpful to get me out of my thoughts and into my body sensations. I'm staying for the community of like-minded individuals and the meditations (fireside) with Su.  I meditate alot but often stay too much in my head or my thoughts. Su's self-compassion meditation had me in the right place in very short time and being that it's a public session, I can feel more connected to others. Thank you for a great way to use VR to enhance my life. 4 stars because I can't find a way to exit the Fireside chat w/out having to quit the app. I often just want back in the lobby.
This app will not only bring you peace....it will also bring transformation.

Before Mindway, my life was a mess. I was all over the place trying to figure out who I was and struggling to do even ordinary things, like keeping a clean apartment. 

Now, I use mindfulness in as many ways that I can. From changing my perspective on cleaning to making mindful food choices.

I especially love the live fireside meditation with Su as the guide. This live meditation is available 3 days a week. Su is very welcoming and a terrific guide. Give it a try yourself.
Lies about not charging your account for the first month. It does. The live sessions are always empty. Lot of 5 star reviews written by developers friends. Steer clear.

developer_response.body:
Hi Sam, the payment system is set up directly by Meta, and it shouldn't be charging you until your free trial period is over. If it has done so, please reach out to me at tim@mindwayvr.com and I will help you either get your money back, or resolve the issue someway else.

As for the live sessions, please make sure you are joining at the scheduled times; as there are always people in any given scheduled session. Again, happy to assist you through email on this one.

reviews.review_description: On my oculus three having problems checking in how do we fix this? how do I get help where to go at for this app? I just started my seven day free will be up soon and now I can’t get in it. I was starting to like the app but I need help. It says checking it’s looking for something but is not letting me go into the room. I missed the meeting today. Someone please help.

developer_response.body: Hi Chefrob 21; Tim here, CEO at Mindway. Please email me at tim@mindwayvr.com and I'll make this right. Our backend servers went down a few days ago but they are up and running again now - I think this was probably what was causing you problem.

reviews.review_description: While I am enjoying the 30 day meditations I am a little frustrated that I have been unable to access  lessons 2 or 3 in the journey menu. Why is that?

developer_response.body:
Hi Firefox - we recently discovered a bug that was causing such issues for some and fixed it; please do email me if the problem has not gone away at tim@mindwayvr.com

In fact - please do email me regardless and just reference this review, and I'll send you something you may find useful

Best,
Tim, CEO @ Mindway

reviews.review_description: Have to try it's a great app !!

I am so grateful for this app! I've been dealing with trauma and recovering from burnout...I wish I discovered your app earlier... Your teachings help me to deal with stressful situations better and I just simply love meditating and relaxing with your app! Thank you❣️I also, LOVE your "boost your energy " option to start the day. After what I've been through my mind would start to reprocess what I didn't want to focus on. I am very grateful for your app.

developer_response.body:
Thank you soooo much for your great review, it makes us all very happy to hear that Mindway has been of help. 

Best,
Tim, CEO @ Mindway

reviews.review_description:
Great application! 
I'm pathing through 30 days journey, when I reached day 4 it's doesn't run and after this all next days become unlocked. Hope you'll fix it soon.

developer_response.body:
Hello there!

Thank you for your kind words and for reporting this issue. We’re sorry that Day 4 isn’t running properly and is unlocking all subsequent days prematurely. Our team is already working on a fix, and we’ll release an update very soon.

Thanks again for your patience and for helping us improve the app. Wishing you happy and mindful days!

reviews.review_description:
First, I have to say Su from Mindway who runs weekly guided meditation sessions is fantastic. You can tell she’s passionate about the work she does, and her guided meditations are so relaxing, engaging, and i came away feeling deeply inspired and energized.

Live weekly sessions are just one of the many fantastic features of Mindway. I’ve found a daily practice with the 30 days of mindfulness episodes. They’re incredibly accessible for any level of mindfulness practice, and are an easy way to bring mindfulness into your everyday. All of the meditations they offer (and there are a lot) are very repeatable, which I’ve found very valuable when considering the subscription. 

Do yourself a favor, and try the free trial, commit to a daily practice, and see what Mindway will do for your mental wellbeing.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review!

reviews.review_description:
Su is a very good facilitator, and makes everyone feel welcome.    Looking forward to the update so we can see each others avatars.

Thank you Su,
From Cindy (CIAnotaspy)
USA

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review, and happy to inform you the avatar update is being worked on right now. It's a big of a hefty task as there are lots of back end modifications required, but we're getting there!

reviews.review_description: I've tested several VR meditation apps, and what stands out about this one are the interactive features and live sessions. I did my first live meditation with Su yesterday and really enjoyed it! Looking forward to future sessions and hoping participation grows as the community expands.

Being told by my doctor to try some mindfulness exercise due to my depression and came across Mindway. Really enjoying the recorded exercises so far. But what stands out is the live meditation session. I attended my 1st one with Su today. It was great!

reviews.review_title: Incredible Help in this Stressful World
reviews.review_description: I am female.  I have had my Quest 3 for 6 months.  Tried many worlds, games, exercise and Meditation sites.  This World of Mindway Mindfulness Meditations is saving me.  I so wish I had discovered it many years ago.  I especially  like their Journeys.  The best one so far for me is starting your day with "Boost Your Energy".  It changes your outlook on your day in 9 minutes.  It works!!!!!!!   Also the 3 minute " Handle your anger" is so handy.  I think there are over 70 Journeys.  I am still in discovery.  3 times a week they do Live "Fireside Mediations" with SU.  Make sure you show up.  It does give you a feeling of community and Su is very good at making you completely relax.  At night I use their ASMR to shut my brain down and it works. One that I thought at first was silly really works for me just before sleeping and that is the journey in the HairSalon.  My brain follows all the different sounds and forgets the hustle and bustle of life.  If I wake up for hrs in the middle of the night I jump into Mindway and am ready to fall asleep within 15 min.  I see all age brackets show up at the Fireside Mediations.  It shows how important it is for everyone to be grounded in todays strange events.  There is also a 30 Day Mindfulness Calender.  I am redoing it each month.   The scenes and colours are a delight.  The voices so calm.  The reaffirming of myself for just being myself is slowly sinking in.   Just an amazing experience.  Thank you.    Yesterday we learned how to do an Ear Massage.  Today my body was so much more relaxed.  A big Thanks  Vikki from Canada
Won't let me get past the registration login screen.

developer_response.body:
Hi MindfulTraveler; could you email me at tim@mindwayvr.com please? Usually this is an issue relating to some settings on your headset, and it should take us only a few minutes to resolve. Sorry it happened to you!

Best,
Tim, CEO

reviews.review_description: Let me tell you I’m a combat vet w/ ptsd as many of all the service members I have served with. I have been active in counseling for years but this app in a few days was a game changer. I have used other apps such as FloatVr which is an awesome app and really got me into mental health in vr. From the demo I just knew this one felt different. I instantly signed up for the year membership. This is an app I raved to my va mental health therapist about so much I am trying to get them to pay for my lifetime membership. Pray they bless me lol! But definitely 5 star I hope this continue to evolve because this app is awesome! Will be  this one to all my friends.

developer_response.body:
Thank you soooo much for sharing this amazing review - really appreciate it! Any questions at all and you're always welcome to reach out to me at tim@mindwayvr.com

- Tim, CEO @ Mindway

reviews.review_description: The demo was terrible, and they charge a lot for a lifetime plan, which, as of this review, is $80.00. This is more than twice the cost of other apps.
I enjoy it wish they would add new content regularly.

The combination of prerecorded sessions as well as daily live group sessions with a qualified therapist makes this unique and extremely helpful. So glad I took the lifetime subscription, please note that an hour of a real life therapist costs more.

A special thanks to Su, who is a fantastic calm therapist who assists you in the group sessions.

I’m exploring different meditation and personal growth apps, as I am both a sound therapist and a vocal therapist. I found this one very beautiful and welcoming, but most of all, it encourages me to return every day for the sense of peace and tranquility it provides. The sounds, especially the voice of the guide, which I find warm and enveloping, add to the experience.  

What is offered and how it is presented serve as an inspiration to reflect and expand our inner self. I also appreciate that it doesn’t feel overly artificial like others, which often turn out to be repetitive and dull. I find it elegant, with music that truly aligns with the practice being performed.  

So, thank you from Italy! Anna Chiara Farneti
Not only does mind way offer a wide variety of meditative immersive experiences. It also offers free, live meditations with a licensed psychologist!

The graphics of the environments are truly impressive, and the voice of the guide is wonderfully pleasant. The locations are stunning, and I absolutely love the variety and quality of the images and interactions. The selection of songs perfectly complements the content. I just hope the developers continue adding more content because I’m absolutely in love with this app. Kudos to the team—fantastic job!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for sharing - such comments are a huge motivation for us here at Team Mindway!

reviews.review_title: Meditation apps are hackneyed cash grabs
reviews.review_description: Who would pay for this malarkey?

Let me tell you what this is doing better than Tripp, since I know you're all wondering!

1 - You can turn! You're not locked in place! You can look around! Fantastic.

2 - The menus are so much easier to navigate and understand. Tripp is fine, but I find it very confusing to figure out what's going on or get it to go what I want. 

3 - The "build your own" content allows you to turn off voice guidance, and while Tripp also allows you to do that, they still force you to have that glowy breathing thing that's VERY distracting to me, and it ruins the environment. Mindway doesn't, and I love that. 

4 - There are no mandalas, fractals, whatever you call them, those symmetrical shapes that just come at you in an endless, like, tube? Too many of these meditation apps are leaning hard on that, and in my opinion you only need ONE of those to cover anyone who wants one, not fifty different types k guys! This app has lots of different scenes and they're all beautiful and amazing. 

5 - The voice guidance guy is much better than the lady on Tripp. No offense to her, but she's very bored sounding and I don't find her relaxing.

And lastly but most amazingly! 

I had a problem with my subscription, Meta's fault, and the CEO himself investigated my help request and upgraded me for free from a monthly membership to a lifetime membership! Whaaaaat for real my peeps! (First and last time I've ever said "my peeps," I hope you enjoyed it.) I have had to contact Tripp for a question before trying it, and then a technical issue after, and both times I got a bland human or possibly robot. 

So Mindway is much more human and is still trying, which in a world full of seeming NPCs is just super.

💜

This app is AMAZING.  I did the ASMR and normally that stuff drives me bonkers. THIS ? Wow, just wow. I feel with the RIGHT ASMR which is in this app you can have an incredibly relaxing experience before getting some much needed sleep.Just wished they had lifetime subscriptions.

Wouldn't load just stuck on the same page! I restart my headset and came out of the app still the same issue. I signed up said checking so can log me in automatically nothing happened I didn't even have the chance to see what it was like I may just uninstall it

developer_response.body:
I'm really sorry to hear that Yazzy :( Please email me at tim@mindwayvr.com and I'll make it right.

- Tim, CEO @ Mindway

reviews.review_description: I don’t think I come access such a substandard application, this application leaves a lot more work for my satisfaction

I just found Mindway after using Tripp for years.  I’m loving the content so far and the different approach.

Currently I’m on a monthly sub but I would seriously consider a lifetime membership if I knew how to find it.

I’m hoping they continue to add content as this is key to continued market growth.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for sharing your lovely words! Your support really means a lot. 

To upgrade to the lifetime, you'll have to cancel your monthly membership and then the lifetime will become available. I know that's a bit inconvenient and we're working on a fix at the moment. If you have any trouble at all with that, please email me at tim@mindwayvr.com and I'll get you set up!

Best,
Tim, CEO

reviews.review_description: I wanted to try it out, but it won’t let you proceed if you’re not suffering through a mental disorder. I don’t have anxiety or high stress levels, problems sleeping, etc so that option should be skippable.

developer_response.body:
Hi! I just took a look at the onboarding screen you mentioned, where it asks if there's anything like anxiety or sleeplessness that you'd like to work on - and you're absolutely right: there is no option to skip, which is a huge oversight on our behalf.

We'll get that updated in the app ASAP. Thank you for bringing it to our attention!

In the meantime, you're welcome to select any one of the options that interests you the most - this won't affect the actual app experience it all, the only thing those questions do is allow the app to point you in the direction of recommended content.

Again, thank you for bringing this to our attention!

Tim, CEO @ Mindway

reviews.review_description: I gave the app a go and there’s a lot of useful journeys and practice courses. I would say 1 day trial was not enough time to really get a good feel of what’s on offer. But in the time I had to try it out there’s some good courses on managing breathing and meditation. Just taking breaks from chaotic work / life and recentring myself.

The app offers three kind of journeys. Those that help with sleep, those that help with mindfulness in various ways and those aimed at relaxation. The sleep journeys seem very well suited to put you in a relaxed mood. The only real issue I see that you don't really want to fall asleep with the headset still on. The mindfulness journeys nice. I liked how they make you slow your breathing by showing the air going in and out, in a way that suits VR very well. The lessons don't seem too advanced, but are great for more basic mindfulness. The last category is some relaxing games. Other than these, there is also a fireside, where you can meet people online.

All in all, a good app that is suited for those who have a busy life and want some guided meditation and relaxation.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your detailed experience with Mindway! Your insights are invaluable to us, and we're happy that Mindway provides a good balance of guided meditation and relaxation for your busy life. Thank you for being part of our community!

reviews.review_description: Mindway is one of the better apps available for mindfulness and meditation. The narration is generally clear and pleasant, the environments are varied and good quality. Some other apps I have tried have too much visual abstract stimulus which people may find uncomfortable. The nice thing about Mindway is that there is the option to do guided meditation through a variety of journeys, or create your own experience if you don't want to follow a guided session. The content appears to get updated with some regularity and they are open to feedback or suggestions. Overall, although somewhat costly, it is one of the better apps currently out there as a wellbeing tool.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We're grateful to have you as part of our community!

reviews.review_description: I first discovered Mindway about five months ago. At that time I joined their discord community and loved how open the developers were with the community there. It seems to be a very safe and welcoming place. I passed along my feedback at that time, and I'm happy to see many improvements in the current version of the game. While by itself, this app is excellent for promoting relaxation and positive well-being, what excites me the most is the "build your own experience" option. I would love to see Mindway grow this option into something world-class. The ability to sculpt a unique experience that I could then share with others through this app will truly set it apart. I love the potential here.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your insightful review! We're thrilled to hear that you've had a positive experience with Mindway and our community. We're committed to creating a safe and welcoming environment for all users, and it's fantastic to know that you've found our Discord community to be just that. Thank you for your support :) If you have any further feedback or suggestions, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're here to make Mindway the best it can be for our community.

reviews.review_description:
Read the privacy policy! They gather not only the information you give them but information from your social media and share it with not only affiliates but random advertisers.

Their website says they have a 7 day free trial but clicking it just opens the Meta app. The app itself makes you pay other than the short demo. The demo wasn’t very impressive at all, I can’t believe they think people would pay based on that alone.

If you’re looking for a meditation app try Tripp instead. They offer several demos before you have to pay. Their graphics are more impressive and best of all they are cheaper!

developer_response.body:
Hi Roobina!

Really sorry about the mix up there, which was completely our fault. The 7 day free trial was meant to go live in the app tomorrow but it went up on the website a day early. I've had the development team define the free trial to your account manually so you should have access now and I'd love to get your thoughts on the app itself!

As for the privacy policy, we unfortunately do have to include the statements you mentioned for legal reasons but I can assure you we are very careful and private with any data we collect, and we don't share sensitive information. We also don't have any access to your social media beyond the basic info about the Meta account you use to log in to the Meta Quest (which we're required to collect). It's more so data on things like what percent of a certain meditation program you completed so that we can email you with suggestions on how to get more out of Mindway. 

I've dropped you an email with a remedy and thank you for your feedback!

Tim, CEO @ Mindway

reviews.review_title: Now my Favorite Meditation App on Meta!
reviews.review_description:
I have tried multiple meditation apps and I have to say this is the best one I have ever seen. It teaches you in so many different ways. It has meditation lessons, 30 days of mindfulness teachings. ASMR relaxation experiences, anxiety relief, mental health social events plus there are so many different environments and it is always dynamic which keeps you engaged. There is so much to explore and learn I signed up for lifetime membership before the trial even ended when I saw how much content there was. I can't wait to see what the future  holds for this developer! 

Keep up the great work!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your incredible feedback! We're absolutely thrilled to hear that you've found Mindway to be the best meditation app you've encountered. Your support means the world to us, and we're committed to continuously expanding and improving Mindway to provide you with even more valuable content and experiences in the future.

If you ever have any questions, suggestions, or feedback for us, please don't hesitate to reach out. Thank you for choosing Mindway, and we're looking forward to embarking on this mindfulness journey with you!

reviews.review_description:
So glad I found this app. I always have the best intentions, but I find it hard to stick to a meditation schedule. This app and all the great content makes it easy and enjoyable and something to look forward to. I like that there is also scheduled public events led by a real teacher, though it's a bit confusing working out the timings of these as I'm in the UK and the events are scheduled in EST. Great to see new content being added as well.

One suggested improvement that I'd love to see is the option to stay in an environment after the guided session ends so I can carry on meditating on my own for a bit longer.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We truly appreciate your suggestions and support. Having you as part of our community means a lot to us. Rest assured, our developers are actively working on implementing that feature.

reviews.review_title: A Work in Progress & priced poorly
reviews.review_description:
Mindway is a nice VR meditation app that owes a lot (both in design and pricing) to TRIPP.  I've spent the past month delving deep into what is on offer in Mindway, and there is a lot to like.  It is laid out in 3 sections--Sleep, Journey, and ASMR.  The "Journey" section contains most of the meditations and has both a "composer" feature (like TRIPP) as well as specific topics (e.g. Mindfulness) which have multiple meditations.  There is also a built-in component for live, multiplayer meditations, but they only offered a single session over the past month.

I am a VR meditation enthusiast and have attempted to evaluate every VR meditation apps since 2016.  I really like what I see in Mindway.  The menus are well thought out, the experiences are (mostly) high-quality, the narration is professional.  That said, as of May 2023, Mindway is still very much in a "beta" stage.  A significant amount of listed content is shown as "Coming Soon" (i.e., unavailable).  Although the experiences are put together very well, there are still some rough glitches where the narration is out of sync with the visuals.  The multiplayer feature for group meditations is practically unused (only 1 meeting was offered over the 30 days I tested the app).  

The amount of content currently on offer is decent, but insufficient to justify the cost of Mindway.  The developers have decided they want to copy TRIPP's subscription pricing model.  Current pricing is $5 a month, $30 a year, or $50 for lifetime.  The issue is that the currently available content MIGHT warrant a price of $20.  Putting aside my personal disdain for subscription services, there's just not enough content/features currently available to justify this pricing.  If the developers are married to a subscription model, I'd recommend they re-evaluate and price at $5 monthly, $25 annually, and $40 lifetime--at least until the app gets refined and more content added.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback Dr Forbin - it's very valuable to us; I'm very happy that you have found much that you like, and will take your points of concern to heart! After your comment we ran the app through a complete round of user testing and identified a couple bugs you may have experienced, for example, the clouds in episode 4 our Managing Anxiety journey were out of date and therefore glitching. Over the next few days all of the bugs we identified should be fixed!

As for the multiplayer fireside area, we do try to have at least 4 events a month - the best place to stay up to date with these is on our calendar at mindwayvr.com/events or on our social media channels. Over the next few weeks, we'll also be adding around 4 new meditation courses to Mindway (in areas like Burnout Management and Self-Confidence, each comprising of at least 3 episodes). And we even have 30 new meditations going live all at once very soon!

Thanks again and as always, for any other suggestions you may have, I'm always one email away at tim@mindwayvr.com

reviews.review_description: I recently tried the  app and I have to say, I was thoroughly impressed! The experience was incredibly immersive and truly transported me to a calming and peaceful environment. The app is well designed and the guided meditations were very helpful in helping me focus and relax. I would highly recommend this app to anyone looking to incorporate VR into their meditation practice or for anyone looking for an effective stress-reliever. Well done!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your glowing review! Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we're grateful for your kind words. We're committed to continuously improving and providing effective stress-relief experiences for our users.

If you have any further feedback or suggestions, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're here to support you on your mindfulness journey, and we appreciate you being a part of the Mindway community!

reviews.review_description: Talked to the dev behind this app. I am really fascinated by their dedication and commitment to leveraging XR tech for mental wellness. Keep up the good work!

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We're grateful to have you as part of our community!

reviews.review_description: Relaxing, fun, plenty of content. Visuals for some of the meditations are exceptional, scenes are great. Sleep meditation really helps put the mind at ease. Look forward to seeing more content in this realm, it is amazing what capabilities are available to us now with VR technology, and its great to see apps like Mindway reach into this new world to calm down, destress, meditate, and relax.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoy our experiences. Thank you for being part of the Mindway community, and we look forward to providing you with even more immersive experiences in the future!

reviews.review_title: The Most Valuable Self Improvement App!
reviews.review_description: With having using most of the other meditation apps out there Mindway by far has the most incredible graphics calming music and I love the use of ASMR sounds. Truly helpful topics like anxiety, mindfulness, & feeling burnt-out. It has helped me get out of a bit of a depressed funk I was in I'm so grateful to this beautifully amazing product. Save time and money just download this app 1st you won't regret it I promise!!! Thank you so much can't wait to join the free events in Rec Room 🤩🧘🏻‍♀️

developer_response.body:
I'm so glad Mindway helped you navigate negativity CometRider and thank you for your lovely review!

- Tim, Cofounder @ Mindway

reviews.review_description:
✨️🧘‍♀️✨️ 🧘‍♂️✨️🧘‍♀️✨️🧘‍♂️✨️

The visuals are stunning, and the meditation choices are endless!

✨️🧘‍♀️✨️ 🧘‍♂️✨️🧘‍♀️✨️🧘‍♂️✨️

Whether you're experienced at meditation or a beginner.. this app is perfect for you!

✨️🧘‍♀️✨️ 🧘‍♂️✨️🧘‍♀️✨️🧘‍♂️✨️

This is also the only meditation app I've seen that has ASMR included!

✨️🧘‍♀️✨️ 🧘‍♂️✨️🧘‍♀️✨️🧘‍♂️✨️

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We're grateful to have you as part of our community!

reviews.review_title: Now the BEST Meditation App on Quest
reviews.review_description:
Let me start off by saying I own probably every meditation app, including TRIPP, Maloka,etc.  TRIPP used to be my favorite, but it gets to be rather repetitive in how they set up their meditations whereas Mindways is constantly keeping me guessing with new environments, and completely different ways of thinking about meditation. The addition of the 30 days of meditation has been amazing and I hope they keep doing those.

GREAT GREAT MEDITATION APP, the BEST PERIOD!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you sooo much for this awesome review, it means a lot! We're going to double down on everything you said you liked - and we're releasing a brand new journey set in a winter wonderland environment soon.

Happy thoughts,
Tim (Co-Founder @ Mindway)

reviews.review_description: I have been using Mindway for the past month, and I have to say it has completely transformed my sleep experience. Before using the app, I struggled with falling asleep and staying asleep throughout the night, but since incorporating the "Unwind into Sleep" script into my bedtime routine, I have been able to fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer.  I highly recommend Mindway to anyone looking to improve their sleep quality.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your experience with us! We're thrilled to hear that Mindway has had such a positive impact on your sleep quality. Improving sleep quality is such an important aspect of overall well-being, and we're honored that Mindway has been able to play a role in transforming your sleep experience. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we hope that Mindway continues to support you in achieving restful nights and refreshed mornings.

reviews.review_description: Helped me with my sleep problems and diagnosed ADHD so I can concentrate better.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your positive review! It's heartening to know that our platform has been able to contribute to your well-being in such meaningful ways. If there's anything else we can do to support you on your journey, please don't hesitate to let us know. Your well-being is our priority.

reviews.review_description: Even though I did a little of exploration with the app, it was rather calming. Helped clear my head of a few things and it allowed me to be a little more clear minded. Been overwhelmed recently. I do truly hope that the creation of this app will help many other people in need of meditation. Being able to flush out your mind can be hard but with the right mindset and meditation, it’ll help. There are different ways to meditate to get rid of not only the negative energy but also over positive energies. Ultimately getting your head cleared up so that you’re able to function properly. Best regards, stay safe and keep your head up high <33

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your experience with us! We're glad to hear that Mindway was able to provide you with a calming experience and help clear your head amidst feeling overwhelmed. If you have any further feedback or suggestions, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're here to support you on your mindfulness journey, and we appreciate you being a part of the Mindway community!

reviews.review_description: Normally, it is hard for me to relax with  common tools, but the mix of good visuals and sounds in a relaxing VR environment in this App helped me get better results in relaxation and personal harmony

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review Hernando!

Tim, Cofounder @ Mindway

reviews.review_description: The thirty day meditations are amazing, very well thought out, beautiful and very helpful. I do wish they would have more classes in the meeting area. There are very few and most are moved to vr chat. There would be fewer interruptions if you used the meeting room in mindway. You need more teachers! I want to give a shout out to Su who hosts a beautiful meditation group. I love it! Also, I know some people mentioned Tripp, I have Tripp also and I like both but Mindway has better actual practice meditations, I think they are super unique, I spend a lot more time in Mindway, it’s really helped me on my journey!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your wonderful feedback and for sharing your experience with us! our suggestion regarding more classes in the meeting area is duly noted, and we'll certainly take it into consideration as we continue to improve and expand our offerings.If you have any further feedback or suggestions, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're here to support you every step of the way, and we're grateful to have you as part of the Mindway community!

reviews.review_title: Excellent App that makes a difference
reviews.review_description: Due to extreme stress and various other factors at work, I experienced burnout last year. I’ve tried loads of apps and read tons of self help books but this app has really made a difference. Highly recommend this app if you’re going through a tough time

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We're grateful to have you as part of our community!

reviews.review_description: It's an excellent app. I felt like I was right there. It's beautifully designed. I definitely recommend you to at least try it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your experience! We appreciate your support and hope you continue to enjoy Mindway!
